creator: mandree@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Matthias Andree from comment #11)
actually this batch file may produce duplicates. This is a corrected version for bash:

#! /usr/local/bin/bash
join -t " " -a1 -o 1.2,2.2,2.3 <(pkg query '%n-%v %o' |sort) <(pkg query '%n-%v %At @%Av'|grep flavor|sort)  | sed 's/ flavor @/@/'
